productDisplayName: French Connection Men Black Leather Belt
description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection belt, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Product Details Black belt with a square bronze coloured buckle Has a press buckle closure with holes to customise the Fit Designs on the wide buckle Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
